title: Per-project mutation suppression budget
description: Schema for `<project-root>/.claude/mutation-budget.yml` (or .json). Caps the number of `@claude-allow-mutation` markers a project can carry so suppression debt cannot grow silently. The `scripts/mutation_budget_check.py` script walks the project, counts markers per detector category, and exits non-zero when any cap is exceeded. CI invokes this script on every PR.

version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for the v2.x hook series.

total.description: Maximum number of `@claude-allow-mutation` and `claude-allow-mutation` markers allowed across the entire project. Counted across `.js`, `.jsx`, `.ts`, `.tsx`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` files. Files inside `node_modules`, `dist`, `build`, `out`, `.next`, `.nuxt` are excluded by default.

per_detector.description: Optional per-category caps. Keys are detector prefixes (e.g. `array`, `collection`, `date`). The script reads the trailing `-- <reason>` of every marker and counts hits whose nearby line carries a detector hint. Caps default to the value of `total` when not specified.

include.description: Glob patterns for files to include. When omitted, all `.js`/`.ts`/`.jsx`/`.tsx`/`.mjs`/`.cjs` files are scanned.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude. Defaults: `**/node_modules/**`, `**/dist/**`, `**/build/**`, `**/out/**`, `**/.next/**`, `**/.nuxt/**`, `**/coverage/**`.

grace_period_days.description: Number of days a newly-added marker is exempt from the budget. Lets a team land emergency suppressions and pay them down within a window. The script reads `git blame` to age each marker; when git history is missing, the marker counts immediately.

require_justification.description: When true, the script fails for any marker missing the `-- <reason>` trailer. Mirrors the runtime hook's behavior.

report_format.description: Output format. `text` for terminals, `json` for downstream tooling, `sarif` for GitHub code scanning upload.
